name: SKY’S THE LIMIT: Veil || Modern Fantasy RPG
description:
“Newly turned husband of local vampire celebrity Jackson Marro goes berserk in a case of blood starvation, caused by Marro not leaving enough blood before turning him. While they were quickly detained by an on-duty Werewolf, the Vampire Council is facing heavy backlash for allowing Marro to turn their spouse instead of having a more experienced Council Member do so…” - The Daily Scry

—————————————

Hello again! It is me, if you are one of the few lovely people who have used my other RPG bots <3

This time I felt like doing some more mystical stuff. As the title implies, this time the setting takes place during the modern day. STL: Veil is focused on a classic secret society of crazy shit in the background, carefully preserved by the powers that be.

What you need to know: While the story takes place in a nondescript city, the hidden society is known as “The Other” and is primarily governed by various powerful heads of supernatural beings.

There aren’t really any limits on what beings exist. You could be an angel or demon, an undead or a yokai or a cryptid, so on and so forth. Please, feel free to be gay and do crime as a bigfoot or whatever else comes to mind.

That being said, there are a few major players when it comes to running The Other. You have the classic vampires and werewolves, but also a hierarchy of witches and spirits as well. There are a few details on the heads of each species and how their factions govern The Other as well as how they interplay with normal people stuff, but that’s in the details. If you want to find out more organically in the plot, then go ahead and start now - otherwise, check out the character details.

If you like my bot but feel that there’s just one or two things missing from making it perfect for you, please feel free to copy and paste it! I don’t mind, I don’t get paid for the bots and are happy if my writings bring people joy :) just maybe refrain from publishing your version, at least not without giving credits.

Like always, the bot is limitless bc why not, but there’s no smutty details so don’t expect too much if you try some nsfw stuff. Have fun!
creator: BoyoBoy
